attacks.name: Channeled Palm Strike
attacks.description: Perform an avoidable normal attack. Deals ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% of your normal damage and has a ${onHitEffect0chance}% chance to Stun the Enemy for ${onHitEffect0turns} turn(s) on hit.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Make an <avoidable> normal attack. On hit, <hitEffect>.

attacks.name: Shadowshot
attacks.description: You quickly fire a targeted arrow that deals ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% of your normal damage. On hit, inflict Bleed that deals ${onHitEffect0DamageMaxValue0} damage over ${onHitEffect0duration}s, and apply Immobilize (Can't Attack) for ${onHitEffect1turns} turns. Then, Slink Into Shadows and gain +${onHitEffect2modValue0}% Global Evasion, +${onHitEffect2modValue1}% Damage Reduction and -${onHitEffect2modValue2}% Attack Interval for ${onHitEffect2turns} turns. If effects are already active, perform a regular attack instead.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Quickly fire an arrow, dealing <damage> and <onhitEffect>. If effects already active, perform a regular attack instead.

attacks.name: Barrage
attacks.description: Barrage the Enemy with a hail of arrows that each deal ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% of your normal damage, and have a ${onHitEffect0chance}% to apply 1 stack of Hobbled (Attack Interval is increased by 1% per stack, up to 25 stacks).
attacks.descriptionGenerator: An <avoidable> attack that deals <damage> <count> times. On use, <prehitEffect>.

attacks.name: Quick Reload
attacks.description: You take a moment to grease the track of your crossbow, gaining -${preHitEffect0modValue0}% Ranged Attack Interval for ${preHitEffect0turns} turns. If buff is already active, perform a regular attack instead.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: You grease the track of your crossbow, gaining <prehitEffect>. If buff is already active, perform a regular attack instead.

attacks.name: Big Smash
attacks.description: You smash the Enemy for ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% of your normal damage. If you hit, you gain 1 stack of Barbaric Strength, giving you for ${onHitEffect0modValue} Flat Melee Max Hit until the End of the Fight.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: You make an attack that deals <damage>. On hit, <hitEffect>.

attacks.name: Eradication
attacks.description: You snuff the life force out of the Enemy, dealing damage equal to ${attackDamageMaxValue0}%-${attackDamageMaxValue1}% of their current HP, and heal for ${lifesteal}% of the damage dealt. Uses Prayer Points.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Make an attack that deals <damage>.

attacks.name: Relentless Fury
attacks.description: Your fists mutate into zealots of unbridled rage. Make ${hitCount} attacks, each dealing a small percentage of your Maximum Hit: 1st—${attackDamageMaxValue0}%; 2nd—${attackDamageMaxValue1}%; 3rd—${attackDamageMaxValue2}%; 4th—${attackDamageMaxValue3}%; and 5th—${attackDamageMaxValue4}%. Each hit has a ${onHitEffect0chance}% chance to decrease your Damage Reduction by ${onHitEffect0modValue}% for the rest of the fight and to inflict a 1-turn Stun on the Enemy.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Attack <hitCount> times, dealing <damage> and <hitEffect> on hit.

attacks.name: Barrage of Flaming Death
attacks.description: Your fists become humble servants of the eternal godflame, Ragnar. Make ${hitCount} attacks, each dealing a small percentage of your Maximum Hit: 1st—${attackDamageMaxValue0}%; 2nd—${attackDamageMaxValue1}%; 3rd—${attackDamageMaxValue2}%; and 4th—${attackDamageMaxValue3}%. Each hit has a ${onHitEffect0chance}% chance (doubled if the Enemy is Burning) to inflict Deadfire, a powerful Burn that deals ${onHitEffect0DamageMaxValue0}% of the Enemy's current hitpoints as damage over ${onHitEffect0duration}s.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Attack <hitCount> times, dealing <damage> and <hitEffect> on hit.

attacks.name: Spiked Carapace
attacks.description: Your gloves instantly grow to five times their size and form a massive, spiky shell around your body for ${preHitEffect0turns} turn(s). While protected by this carapace, you have +${preHitEffect0modValue0}% Reflect Damage, +${preHitEffect0modValue1}% chance to ignore Slow Effects, and +${preHitEffect0modValue2}% Flat Damage Reduction. If this buff is already active, make a normal attack instead.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: On use, <preHitEffect>. If buff already active, make normal attack.

attacks.name: Stonewall
attacks.description: Upon driving your fists into the rocky earth, you conjure a massive stone barrier, giving you +${preHitEffect0modValue0}% Flat Damage Reduction for ${preHitEffect0turns} turn(s). Then, you hurl the stone at the Enemy, dealing damage equal to ${attackDamageMaxValue0}%-${attackDamageMaxValue1}% of your Defence level (Unavoidable).
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Puts up a wall that <prehitEffect>. Then, deal <damage>. <Avoidable>.

attacks.name: Lich's Madness
attacks.description: Engulf your body in umbral flame and coat your extremities in jet ice shards, inflicting Burn and Frostburn on yourself, then strike ${hitCount} times. On the 1st attack, deal ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% of your normal (doubled if Enemy is Burning). On the 2nd and 3rd attacks, deal damage equal tio ${attackDamageMaxValue1} + ${attackDamageMaxValue2}% of your Magic level. Each hit has a ${onHitEffect0chance}% chance to inflict Burn which deals ${onHitEffect0DamageMaxValue0}% of the Enemy's current hitpoints as damage over ${onHitEffect0duration}s, and Frostburn for ${onHitEffect2turns} turns.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: An <avoidable> attack that deals <damage> damage. On a hit, <hitEffect>.

attacks.name: Fist of the Winter Winds
attacks.description: Harness the winter winds, striking for ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% of your normal damage + ${attackDamageMaxValue1}% of your Magic level. On a hit, ${onHitEffect0chance}% chance to inflict Freeze for ${onHitEffect0turns} turns.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: An <avoidable> attack that deals <damage> damage. On a hit, <hitEffect>.

attacks.name: Toxic Needle Flurry
attacks.description: Fire ${hitCount} small needles from your knuckles in a flurry of jabs that deal up to ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% of your normal damage each (Avoidable). On a hit has a ${onHitEffect0chance}% chance to inflict Poison that deals ${onHitEffect0DamageMaxValue0}% of the Enemy's max hitpoints as damage over ${onHitEffect0duration}s.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Fire <count> small needles that deal <damage> damage each (<Avoidable>). On a hit <hitEffect>.

attacks.name: Cyclone Fist
attacks.description: Surrounds you in wind for ${duration}s, while dealing ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% normal damage ${hitCount} times. Gives you +${preHitEffect0modValue0}% Global Evasion and +${preHitEffect0modValue1} Flat Reflect Damage until the end of the attack.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Surrounds <attacker> in wind for <duration>, while dealing <damage> <avoidable> damage <count> times. On use, <prehitEffect>.

attacks.name: Shatterstrikes
attacks.description: Harnessing pure crystalline power, you make two swift strikes against the Target, each dealing ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% of their maximum hit (doubled if the Enemy is Crystallized). On hit, ${onHitEffect0chance}% chance to apply Crystallization (Target is stunned and takes +50% Damage) for ${onHitEffect0turns} turn(s), and ${onHitEffect1chance}% chance to apply Crystal Sanction (Target's next attack deals no damage).
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Make two <avoidable> attacks that deal <damage>. On hit, <hitEffect>.

attacks.name: Crystal Strike
attacks.description: You focus crystalline energy into your knuckles to make one powerful strike. On hit, deals ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% of your normal damage and has a ${onHitEffect0chance}% chance to apply Crystallization (Target is stunned and takes +50% Damage) for 1 turn.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Make an <avoidable> attack that deals <damage>. On hit, <hitEffect>.

attacks.name: Pandora's spark
attacks.description: Inflict a Triple-charged random effect on yourself and the Enemy

attacks.name: Mounted Strike
attacks.description: Attack normally, on hit instruct your companions to attack twice undodgeably.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Attack <hitCount> for <damage>. On hit, <hitEffect>.

attacks.name: Concussive Smash
attacks.description: Smash into your Enemy's armour, dealing up to 100% + (Enemy DR%) Normal Hit damage (Eg. 25% DR = up to 125% normal hit damage). On a hit, inflicts Daze for 2 turns and has a ${onHitEffect1chance}% chance to inflict Broken. Avoidable.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Smash into your Enemy's armour, dealing up to 100% + (Attacker DR%) Normal Hit damage (Eg. 25% DR = up to 125% normal hit damage). On a hit, <hitEffect>. <Avoidable>.

attacks.name: Devastating Slice
attacks.description: Deliver your massive blade unto the Enemy with a wide, arcing slash that strikes ${hitCount} times for up to ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% of your normal damage per hit. On hit, has a ${onHitEffect0chance}% Chance to inflict Terrify (+15% Attack Interval) on the Enemy for 3 turns.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Attack <hitCount> for <damage>. On hit, <hitEffect>.

attacks.name: Practiced Lunge
attacks.description: Perform a careful, practiced lunge which ignores Enemy Resistance and cannot miss. Deals ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% normal damage.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Perform an <avoidable> attack that ignores Enemy Resistance and deals <damage>.

attacks.name: Whirling Manoeuvre
attacks.description: Whirl your polearm around, attacking ${hitCount} times for ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% of your normal damage each. While attacking, gain +${preHitEffect0modValue1}% Dodge Chance and reflect Enemy attacks for ${preHitEffect0modValue0}% of their damage.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Gain <preHitEffect>, and attack <hitCount> times for <damage>.

attacks.name: Bloodlust
attacks.description: You let out a bloodcurdling warcry, becoming filled with a lust for blood. Gain 1 stack (max 10) of Bloodlust which gives you: +${preHitEffect0modValue0}% Lifesteal, +${preHitEffect0modValue1}% Max Hit, +${preHitEffect0modValue2} Flat Damage to Bleeding targets, -${preHitEffect0modValue3}% Attack Interval, and +${preHitEffect0modValue4}% Self Damage on Hit. Each stack of Bloodlust also gives the Enemy +${preHitEffect1modValue0}% Bleed Damage Taken, -${preHitEffect1modValue1}% Max Hit, -${preHitEffect1modValue2}% Resistance, and +${preHitEffect0modValue3}% Attack Interval.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: You become filled with a lust for blood. On use, <preHitEffect>.

attacks.name: Death Approaches
attacks.description: You find the most vulnerable spot to strike your opponent, dealing ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% of their max HP on hit.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: <Avoidable> attack for <damage>.

tooltipSpans.value: Next attack can't miss and is guaranteed to be a critical hit.
+1 stack on Hit and Evade, -1 stack on Miss and Being Hit (min 1 stack, max 20)

combatEffectTemplates.description: Mixin Template. Defines behaviours for an effect that applies modifiers that decrease in strength each time the character hits with an attack. The effect is removed if the applied modifiers reach zero.
Mixin Template. Defines behaviours for an effect that applies modifiers that increase in strength each time the character evades an attack, up to a maximum value.

Mixin Template. Defines behaviours for an effect that applies modifiers that increase in strength each time the character hits with or evades an attack, up to a maximum value, and decrease in strength each time the character misses with or is hit by an attack.

descriptions.text: ${value}% Max Hit for each 1% of Hitpoints missing
+${value}% Critical Hit chance for each 1% of Hitpoints missing
${value}% chance to convert a successful hit from the Target into a miss per 10,000 Enemy Accuracy Rating

weaponMasteries.name: Thrusting Swords
weaponMasteries.flavorText: Light and well-balanced for dancing around enemies

conditionalModifiers.description: When wielding Thrusting Swords, gain a 10% bonus to Dodge Chance, Convert Miss Into Hit, and Attack Interval.
Unlock the Practiced Lunge Special Attack
If your Shield slot is empty, triple the above bonuses and gain +10% chance to pierce Enemy Resistance.

When wielding Thrusting Swords, gain a 5% bonus to Dodge Chance, Convert Miss Into Hit, and Attack Interval. If you also have nothing equipped in your Shield slot, triple that bonus and gain +10% Chance to ignore Enemy Resistance.
Unlocks the ability to Parry with Thrusting Swords. When an Enemy misses you with an attack, you have a chance to perform a counterattack that deals damage equal to your minimum hit on hit.

combatEffects.customDescription: Unlocks the ability to Disarm. When you hit with an attack, you have a 10% chance to Disarm the Enemy, preventing them from attacking for 1 turn. Chance is increased to 20% if nothing equipped in Shield Slot.

weaponMasteries.flavorText: Simply brutal and brutally simple implements

combatEffects.customDescription: 20% Chance on Hit to inflict Intimidation

conditionalModifiers.description: +10% Max Hit
+5% Max Hit if the Enemy is Intimidated

combatEffects.customDescription: 20% Chance on Hit to inflict Shaken

conditionalModifiers.description: +10% Total Resistance
+5% Total Resistance while if the Enemy is Shaken
Unlock the Mounted Strike Special Attack
Unlock the Devastating Slice Special Attack
1% Chance on Hit, Being Hit, and Evading to inflict a random Fear Effect for 3 turns

+5% Max Hit and Total Resistance while the Enemy is Intimidated
+5% Max Hit and Total Resistance while wielding Greatswords and the Enemy is Shaken
+5% Max Hit and Total Resistance while wielding Greatswords and the Enemy is Terrified
While the Enemy is afflicted by all Fear Effects, gain +30% Max Hit and +15% Total Resistance
Inflict all Fear Effects for 3 turns at the start of the Fight

-10% Summoning Attack Interval, +10% Summoning Max Hit, and +10% Min Hit Based on Max Hit

weaponMasteries.name: Daggers

conditionalModifiers.description: Inflict 1 stack of Vulnerability on Hit and 3 stacks on Critical
Daggers gain +10% Crit Chance.
+25% Bleed and Poison damage. +5% Crit Chance and +50% Crit Multiplier. Double those if Enemy is Bleeding or Poisoned.
Unlock the Death Approaches Special Attack
Gain +150% Crit Multiplier.

combatEffects.customDescription: While the Enemy has at least 1 stack of Vulnerability, its Resistance is halved. Apply 2 extra stacks on Hit if Enemy is Bleeding, 3 on Crit. Repeat if Enemy is Poisoned.

weaponMasteries.name: Axes
weaponMasteries.stupidFlavorText: Good for turning one full-width asshole into two half-width assholes

conditionalModifiers.description: +10% Lifesteal and +1% Max Hit for every 10% of Enemy HP missing

combatEffects.customDescription: 10% chance to inflict Bleed on hit

conditionalModifiers.description: +20% Bleed Lifesteal and +50 total damage to Bleed-inflicted

combatEffects.customDescription: 10% chance to inflict a Bleed on Hit

conditionalModifiers.description: Unlock the Bloodlust Special Attack

25% chance to apply Hemorrhage on Hit while Target is Bleeding.
+10% chance to apply Bloodlust on hit
+10% chance to inflict Hemorrhage on hit
While Enemy is Bleeding, chance for both increases to 20%

conditionalModifiers.description: Gain 10% Global Accuracy Rating per 10,000 Global Evasion and 0.5% Dodge Chance per 10,000 Enemy Global Accuracy Rating
50% Chance to gain 1 stack of Certainty when evading an attack

conditionalModifiers.description: +10% Reflect Damage against ranged attacks
Can equip some Gloves into the Weapon Slot

combatEffects.customDescription: Your first attack is an unavoidable Critical Hit

conditionalModifiers.description: +15% Max Hit while fighting Melee Enemies
+30% Ranged Accuracy Rating while Enemy HP is ≥90%

weaponMasteries.name: Heavy Bows
weaponMasteries.stupidFlavorText: Great for roleplaying as a ballista draw-pull

weaponMasteries.name: Light Bows
weaponMasteries.stupidFlavorText: If a lil' gobbo picked up a lightbow would it be a heavy bow for him? 🤔 emoji

conditionalModifiers.description: -1% Max Hit per 1% Enemy Resistance, but +25% Evasion and -0.2s Attack Interval

combatEffects.description: Attacks have a 1% chance to inflict a random effect on the Enemy: Poison, Burn, Bleed (100%), Slow (20%, 2 turns), or Immobilize (can't attack, 2 turns). Enemy takes +25% DoT Damage for 3 turns after you Evade an Attack.

conditionalModifiers.description: Adds the Shadowshot special attack

When Enemy is afflicted by any DOT effect, you deal +10% Damage and Enemy deals -10%.
When Enemy is afflicted by any Debuff effect, you deal +10% Damage and Enemy deals -10%.

combatEffects.description: When Hit by an Attack, 10% chance to Slink Into Shadows, gaining -0.2s Attack Interval, +40% Evasion, and +10% Flat Resistance for 3 turns. Your Evasion and Resistance are increased by 10% while the Enemy is afflicted by a DOT or Debuff effect (up to +20%).
Can't use Special Attacks. Can't Preserve Ammo. +10% chance on hit to gain 1 stack of Alacrity (-1% Attack Interval, max 25 stacks)
+10% chance on hit to gain 1 stack of Alacrity (-1% Attack Interval, max 25 stacks)

conditionalModifiers.description: -10% Ranged Attack Interval

uiMods.description: You start each fight with a Volley of thrown weapons that lasts for 3 turns (-50% to Attack Interval, Max Hit, and Accuracy)

conditionalModifiers.description: During your Volley, the Enemy is Confused (+2% of remaining HP taken as damage on a successful attack (once per turn, capped at 10K damage)).
During your Volley, +25% Ranged Max Hit and Ranged Accuracy Rating, and the Enemy's attacks are unlucky (they roll twice and take the lowest number).

combatEffects.description:
Attune to an element at the Start of the Fight. The element's spells gain 25% Max Hit and you have a 10% chance to apply an effect:
Air: On Evade, Daze, Can't Special Attack or Evade, Enemy, 3 turns | Water: On Summon Attack, Heal, 150% of Max HP over 20s, Self | Earth: On Being Hit, Fortified, +50% of Current DR added as DR, Self, 3 turns | Fire: On Hit, Burn, Enemy

Gain bonuses while attuned to an element.
Air: -15% Attack Interval which decays on hit and lasts 3 turns | Water: Heal for 5% of your Current HP every 2 turns | Earth: +5% Reflect Damage and 10% to inflict a 100% Bleed when Hit by an Attack | Fire: Enemy takes +15% Damage from Burn

Gain more attunement bonuses:
Air: On Crit, gain 1 stack of Concentration and 1 stack of Impact | Water: On Hit, apply 1 stack of Vulnerability | Earth: At the Start of the Fight, become Steadfast for 3 turns | Fire: At the Start of the Fight, inflict Burn on the Enemy
Attuning to an element also surrounds you in a protective Aura that has effects when Hit by an Attack for 10 turns.

conditionalModifiers.description: +20% Crit Multiplier, +5% of Max HP added as Regen, +5% Flat Resistance, +10% Dmg Dealt to Burning Enemies

Gain powerful bonuses when attuned to an element:
Air: +20% Dmg Dealt when Enemy HP is ≤50% | Water: +10% Dmg Dealt When Player HP is ≥50% and Heal for 10% Max HP on Evade | Earth: +20% Chance to Ignore Fear, Sleep, Slow, and Stun, and +10% Dmg Dealt to Bleeding Targets | Fire: 10% Chance on Hit to apply Burn Vulnerability to the Enemy (x2 Dmg Taken from Burn)

weaponMasteries.name: Special
weaponMasteries.stupidFlavorText: If you're wondering why this exists: yes, it IS because we hate you

conditionalModifiers.description: Can equip Special Weapons in the Shield Slot
